dictionary.shell.owner.title: Platform Control Center
dictionary.shell.owner.detail: See tenants, packages, revenue, runtime health, and incidents in one place.
dictionary.shell.tenant.title: Server Control Panel
dictionary.shell.tenant.detail: Manage server status, orders, players, delivery tools, and bots for this community.
dictionary.owner.app.card.loadingDetail: Loading tenants, runtime health, and current incidents for the owner workspace.
dictionary.owner.app.card.emptyDetail: Wait for the latest owner data to load.
dictionary.tenant.app.card.loadingDetail: Loading server status, orders, players, and support tools for this tenant.
dictionary.tenant.app.card.emptyDetail: Wait for the latest tenant data to load.
dictionary.shell.player.title: Player Portal
dictionary.shell.player.detail: Shop, wallet, orders, stats, and community updates in one place.
dictionary.player.app.card.loadingDetail: Loading wallet, shop, orders, stats, and community updates.
dictionary.player.app.card.emptyDetail: Wait for the latest player data to load.
dictionary.player.notice.lockedTitle: This server has not opened this area yet
dictionary.player.notice.lockedDetail: This server package has not opened this page for players yet, so the portal returned you to an available area first.
